entries.rationale: Removed: the legacy-import membership creation and additive-repair mandates. Preserved: typed drain ownership, atomic session/run transitions, current-chair lease CAS/freeze/reactivation and lost-bridge recovery custody. Boundary expanded to the complete paragraph 3775-3786 from original audit anchor 3784-3786 sha256:1eae300de6061ec99668d21469067a6adb8374d2664f8e8769e9f1eb743f6e46.

Removed: the forward-migration actor. Preserved: one non-terminal run per project session in both modes, one active chair lease per run, bounded predecessor coexistence during takeover/recovery, committed predecessor revocation and membership consistency, and ambiguous duplicate-current-run rejection. The replacement restores the consumed leading `A` of the adjacent live close sentence on the replacement's final line. Original audit anchor 3803-3807 sha256:a5b7b0c64b76d0abee3e8d30f93142f4facb8d9bcde3496349b4bd227dabb41e.

Removed: the v0.36-only label and migration-era test wording. Preserved: AC-038, exact feature negotiation, all malformed-frame and closed-validation cases, revision/resnapshot/polling behaviour, stable UI state, bounded load and Attention non-mutation. Boundary expanded to the complete AC-038 item 5829-5844 from original audit anchor 5829-5833 sha256:9997d38d3e37dae26942090c0d6ac1ed39e2df36f017780acdfcf379c2d00440.
